pdf_area: Legacy Server HTTP API: unique id, hosts, server usage, product version, webserver statistics
next_step: Bearer auth from /grpc is required for product version on this stand; examples are covered.

pdf_area: Legacy HTTP camera stream info, live HLS/RTSP/HTTP, snapshots, frame timestamps, composite stream
next_step: Stream-info, snapshot, live MJPEG, HLS, MP4, RTSP descriptor, RTSP statistics, direct RTSP playback through ffprobe, composite RTSP playback through ffprobe, ONVIF RTP frame timestamp extraction, archive frame, and archive MJPEG are verified with Bearer auth and byte/time caps.
PTZ preflight found zero telemetry/PTZ access points and zero control panels on the demo stand. Add only when a non-production PTZ fixture is present and approved.

pdf_area: Legacy HTTP archive contents, archive stats, archive stream, frame review, bookmarks, delete-video endpoint
tooling: axxon_legacy_http_sweep.py --auth-mode bearer archive_read group; axxon_media_stream_smoke.py archive media group; axxon_bookmark_smoke.py; axxon_grpc_bookmark_smoke.py; axxon_delete_video_noop_probe.py; mutation-playbooks/bookmarks.md
next_step: Archive list/intervals/frame registration time/depth/capacity/calendar plus archive frame and archive MJPEG are verified with Bearer auth. Bookmark reads are verified; documented HTTP create endpoints return HTTP 501 on the demo stand with no codex bookmark left behind. gRPC BookmarkService create/list/update/delete is verified as the runnable bookmark lifecycle fallback. The PDF delete-video DELETE shape is verified as no-op dispatch against a codex-nonexistent-* endpoint/storage pair; real archive deletion remains explicit maintenance work only.

pdf_area: Legacy HTTP archive search: face, LP, VMDA, stranger/familiar face, heatmap, calendar
next_step: Direct gRPC LPR, VMDA, ExecuteHeatmapQuery, bounded BuildHeatmap image generation, legacy HTTP async auto/face/VMDA/stranger/heatmap start/result/delete, image-body face matching, and faceAppearanceRate are verified. Face image input uses a temporary camera 9.Face snapshot and reports only size/hash.

pdf_area: Virtual trigger and external event injection
next_step: With real DetectorEx.1 on camera 1, /v1/detectors/external:raiseOccasionalEvent accepts Event1 and EventHistoryService.ReadEvents finds the injected event. /v1/detectors/external:raisePeriodicalEvent and direct gRPC accept TargetList tracklets, and MetadataService.PullMetadata on hosts/Server/DetectorEx.1/SourceEndpoint.vmda returns the injected tracklet. DetectorEx fixture creation remains a prerequisite; public ChangeConfig creation attempts were not successful.

pdf_area: Legacy HTTP audit/system log and alarms endpoints
next_step: Audit log, detector events, and PDF `/archive/events/alerts/...` alarm reads are verified with Bearer auth.

Legacy HTTP POST /export/archive/..., GET /export/{id}/status, bounded GET /export/{id}/file, and DELETE /export/{id} are verified with a one-frame JPEG export from a current archive timestamp. Cleanup returned HTTP 204.

pdf_area: HTTP macros and virtual IP device state switch
tooling: axxon_macro_smoke.py; axxon_armstate_smoke.py; axxon_legacy_http_sweep.py --auth-mode bearer macros_read group; mutation-playbooks/macros.md
next_step: /macro/list, gRPC macro create/change/launch/remove, and temporary virtual-camera LogicService.ChangeArmState with timeout/rollback are verified.

gRPC PullEvents receives detector events. WebSocket /events returns HTTP 101 but closes immediately across URL Basic auth, explicit Basic header, schema/no-schema, origin variants, camera include, detector include, and device track. Resolve Web server WebSocket behavior or test through a Web server fixture with active /events streaming.

pdf_area: Client HTTP API for layouts and videowalls
next_step: Focused preflight checked 127.0.0.1:8888 and <demo-host>:8888; both refused connections. Add only when an Axxon Client HTTP API target is available.

pdf_area: gRPC macro configuration and macro mutations
next_step: Macro list/batch-get/config reads plus create/change/launch/remove are verified with a temporary disabled empty macro and rollback.

MMExportAgent.0 exists under hosts/Server. StartSession, GetSessionState, bounded DownloadFile, StopSession, and DestroySession are verified with temporary codex sessions; archive snapshot export completed and live export stop/destroy cleaned up. UpdateExportSettings is verified with an ETag-guarded no-op update.

pdf_area: gRPC archive creation, volume changes, cloud archive examples, reindex, remove/link operations
next_step: API surface verified end-to-end for non-destructive paths: temporary archive create/change/remove with rollback, archive traits/volume/disk-space preflight, and no-op FormatVolumes/Reindex/CancelReindex dispatch against a codex-nonexistent-* volume id. Real format/reindex/cancel-reindex/cloud/link operations are NOT executed and remain approval-only behind isolated storage fixtures or explicit maintenance-window approval.

pdf_area: gRPC users, roles, permissions, security policy, IP filtering, LDAP directory mutations
next_step: Users/roles, policies, global/group/object/macro permissions, restricted config, temporary user/role create/password/assignment/removal, temp-role permission updates, no-op password policy/IP filter/trusted-IP writes, and temporary LDAP directory add/edit/remove are verified with rollback. LDAP sync/search still needs a real LDAP fixture; TFA mutations are tracked separately as their own fixture-needed row.
Use a PDF-style VMDA query expression. ExecuteHeatmapQuery and bounded BuildHeatmap image generation are verified; the demo builder is hosts/Server/HeatMapBuilder.0/HeatMapBuilder.

pdf_area: gRPC control panels and water level
next_step: PTZ preflight confirms no control panels; fixture discovery also found no water-level devices. Add examples only after a configured control-panel or water-level device exists.
Prefer active child AppDataDetector subjects for semantic analytics subscriptions; keep bounded duration and event limits.
Lifecycle is verified with a temporary camera and template; add extra body variants only when needed.
Tag&Track tracker reads require a telemetry/PTZ access point; none is configured. Add only after a Tag&Track fixture and safe PTZ read plan are present.

pdf_area: gRPC detector parameter management and Get tracks using GO
next_step: Detector parameter list/read shapes, AVDetector/AppDataDetector create/change/remove, temporary AVDetector main-parameter edit/readback, detector visual polyline edit/readback, PullMetadata tracklets, and exact AppDataDetector event-supplier reads are verified.

pdf_area: Direct gRPC environment walkthrough from the PDF
next_step: Keep examples aligned with AuthenticateEx2 and current client helper.

pdf_area: Embeddable video component for Web server
next_step: The demo Web server exposes the PDF entrypoint /embedded.html. Focused preflight verifies HTTP 200, a Video component title, embedded.js, and component/embed/video signatures without rendering or storing browser artifacts. Browser-rendered screenshot checks remain optional and approval-gated.

SecurityService exposes EnableGoogleAuth/DisableGoogleAuth (proto SecurityService.proto:1000-1002) and EEnableTFAResult/EDisableTFAResult enums. No live TFA mutation evidence on demo stand. Requires a Google Authenticator/OTP fixture and an isolated test user before live enable/disable can be exercised with rollback.
GET /statistics/{three-component video source id} returns 200 with bitrate, fps, width, height, mediaType, streamType. The id must omit the hosts/ prefix.
GroupManager.ListGroups (view=VIEW_MODE_TREE) returns the live group tree with nested children. Mutations (ChangeGroups) follow the documented added/changed/removed shape and stay approval-gated.
LogicService.GetActiveAlerts (camera_ap) and BatchGetActiveAlerts (nodes) verified read-only. Begin/Cancel/Continue/Complete/Escalate require an active alert; rule lifecycle stays approval-gated.
AuthenticationService.RenewSession, RenewSession2, and CloseSession verified on an isolated client instance. New token TTL on this stand is 5 minutes.
TimeZoneManager.GetTimeZone returns the current zone plus the available list; BatchGetZones is verified empty-list dispatch. SetTimeZone remains approval-gated mutation.
Requires a MultimediaStorage.*/Sources/src.* access point (same quirk as GetHistory2). Demo stand has 106 such sources; first one returns 200 with days=[].
Returns the currently authenticated user's index, login, name, date_created, date_expires, and role ids. Sanitized in evidence.

Detector mask is a VisualElement sub-unit under a detector and is mutated via ConfigurationService.ChangeConfig, already covered by the detector visual polyline edit/readback flow in the config mutation smoke.
